title: Dispatcher Assign View — Date Filter
description: Add a date picker to the assign view. Dispatcher selects a date and sees only jobs scheduled for that day per driver column. Unassigned pool shows jobs without a scheduledStart or matching the selected date.
acceptanceCriteria: Date picker shown at top of assign view, defaulting to today
Driver columns show only jobs where scheduledStart matches the selected date
Unassigned pool shows jobs where scheduledStart is null or matches the selected date
Changing the date immediately refetches jobs for that date
Date displayed in Finnish format (dd.MM.yyyy) next to the picker
Jobs within each driver column sorted by scheduledStart time ascending
implementationNotes: Use native <input type='date'> — no external library needed
Fetch jobs using existing scheduledFrom/scheduledTo query params: start of selected day to end of selected day as ISO strings
Unassigned pool fetches separately without date filter to show all unscheduled jobs
Do not modify DriverColumn or JobCard components — only DispatcherBoard.tsx data fetching and layout
Do not touch the schedule view — assign view only
